scripts.test:e2e:role-audit: npm run test:seed && playwright test tests/e2e/user-role-audit.spec.js --config=playwright.config.js
scripts.test:e2e:user-classes: npm run test:seed && playwright test tests/e2e/user-role-audit.spec.js tests/e2e/accessibility-role-smoke.spec.js --config=playwright.config.js
scripts.test:e2e:monday-launch: npm run test:seed && playwright test tests/e2e/monday-launch-smoke.spec.js --config=playwright.config.js
scripts.test:e2e:monday-dry-run: npm run test:seed && playwright test tests/e2e/monday-dry-run.spec.js --config=playwright.config.js
scripts.test:e2e:team-rollout: npm run test:seed && playwright test tests/e2e/team-rollout-smoke.spec.js --config=playwright.config.js
scripts.test:e2e:monday-office: npm run test:seed && playwright test tests/e2e/monday-launch-smoke.spec.js tests/e2e/team-rollout-smoke.spec.js tests/e2e/monday-dry-run.spec.js --config=playwright.config.js
scripts.test:e2e:service-workflow: npm run test:preflight:service-workflow && playwright test tests/e2e/service-workflow.spec.js --config=playwright.config.js
scripts.test:launch-readiness: npm run test:preflight:release-readiness && npm run test:e2e:monday-office && npm run test:e2e:role-audit && npm run test:e2e:a11y-smoke && npm run test:e2e:service-workflow
scripts.test:all: npm run test:cleanup && npm run test:seed && npm run test:preflight:service-workflow && npm run test && npm run test:e2e
